title: Preschool Teacher (Floater)
description:
At Odyssey, our Teachers are passionate early childhood educators who believe in nurturing the whole child. As a Floater Teacher, you will support teaching teams across classrooms and levels, working closely with Curriculum Specialists (CS) and Teachers to ensure continuity of care, learning quality, and classroom operations.

You will contribute to classroom teaching, routine care, and daily operations in a collaborative and supportive environment, while gaining broad exposure across the school.

Key Responsibilities

Developing the Whole Child

Curriculum and Pedagogy

  • Collaborate with the Curriculum Specialist to plan and implement age-appropriate curriculum aligned with Odyssey’s teaching philosophy and pedagogy.
  • Support the application and evaluation of positive classroom management strategies.
  • Participate in classroom observations to plan intentional and differentiated learning strategies.
  • Build trusting and respectful relationships with children through positive and responsive interactions.

Learning Environment

  • Work with the teaching team to design and maintain a safe, engaging, and stimulating learning environment that supports children’s development.

Health, Safety and Well-Being

  • Adhere to operational procedures and SOPs to ensure children’s health, safety, nutrition, and hygiene standards are consistently met.

Collaborating with Families and Community

Family and Community Partnerships

  • Foster strong rapport with families through daily communication and customer-centric parent partnership practices.
  • Participate in and co-facilitate collaborative initiatives involving families and community stakeholders.

Building Professional Capacity

Professional Mastery

  • Engage in continuous professional learning and reflective practice to support personal growth and contribute to the school’s learning community.

Professional Values and Ethics

  • Demonstrate professionalism and apply early childhood education ethics in alignment with Odyssey’s philosophy, culture, and core values.

Building Organisational Capacity

Teamwork and Collaboration

  • Contribute positively to a collaborative and effective teaching team within the class and school.

Vision and Engagement

  • Embrace and embody Odyssey’s vision, mission, and values in daily teaching practices.
  • Support school outreach initiatives, community events, and home-school partnership programmes.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma in Preschool Teaching (recognised by ECDA).
  • Strong communication skills in spoken and written English.
  • Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to work with colleagues, parents, families, and community partners from diverse backgrounds.
  • Teaching experience is an advantage, but fresh graduates are welcome.
  • Highly motivated, energetic, and passionate about children’s learning and development.

postedCompany.description: Odyssey The Global Preschool offers an award winning curriculum within a fully equipped Reggio Emilia inspired campus, specially designed for innovative and exploratory learning amongst children.
postedCompany.name: ODYSSEY THE GLOBAL PRESCHOOL PTE. LTD.
